title: helianthemum croceum
intro: Helianthemum croceum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum croceum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of rockrose include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
